steps.notes: All 27 internal navbar links verified. 1 bug fixed: /api-docs 404 — swagger-output.json not copied to dist/ during tsc build. Fixed build script to include copy step. 2 external links down (WordPress 192.168.86.36:8081 — infra issue, not app bug). Watchlist appears in both Harvesting and Reflecting (intentional duplicate). 2 disabled placeholders (Images, Journal) working as designed.
Reviewed. Navbar clean — 27 links verified, api-docs fix good. WordPress down is Silas's infra concern, not this card. Approved.
